creator: plmshka@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to geoffroy desvernay from comment #1)

Thanks for the suggestion, but I do not consider myself ready for this job.

If the net-mgmt/netdisco itself can do this, maybe it's better to move this task to this port (net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs) or delete it (net-mgmt/netdisco-mibs) as a duplicate feature?

Thank you.
